productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's White With Green Grey Stripes T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% eco-enriched cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on inseam of the collar, graphic print on the front with silver thread detailing, embroidery on right sleeve and metallic brand badge at back of the neckFittingSlimWash care Machine wash in 30 degrees with like colors Wash dark colors separately Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Do not bleach Reshape garment in wet condition to its original form Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade If Cool is the one word that features in your dictionary, this white classic polo tee belongs in your wardrobe. Look fresh and breezy as you walk around town in this cotton t-shirt. The green and blue chest print adds to its charm.
